title: cronmap crons.yaml
description: Schema for cronmap (https://github.com/theizzatbek/gokit/tree/main/cronmap) YAML cron definitions. Add `# yaml-language-server: $schema=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/theizzatbek/gokit/main/schemas/crons.schema.json` to the top of your crons.yaml.

jobs.description: Cron jobs. Each entry is one periodic invocation; ordering is significant only for metric label cardinality (job names key the singleton lock + every collector).

name.description: Unique within the engine. Keys the singleton lock + every cronmap_* metric label. Slugified to derive the default sentry_slug.

handler.description: Name registered via cronmap.RegisterHandler(eng, name, fn) before Build. Missing handler surfaces as cronmap_unknown_handler at Build.

schedule.description: Cron expression. Default parser is 5-field (min hour dom month dow) plus @hourly/@daily/@weekly/@monthly/@yearly descriptors. Override via cronmap.WithParser for seconds-precision schedules. Supports ${VAR} env substitution.

timeout.description: Per-run deadline as a Go duration string (e.g. "5m", "30s"). Runtime wraps fn in context.WithTimeout. DeadlineExceeded gets its own cronmap_runs_total{outcome=timeout} label, NOT bundled into failure. Empty / 0 = no per-run deadline.

singleton.description: Enable leader-elect: only one instance of N pods runs this job per tick. Requires cronmap.WithSingletonLocker at Build (PGLocker is the kit-default backend). Lock-not-acquired increments cronmap_singleton_skipped_total — the HEALTHY signal in N-1 of N pods. Default false.

sentry_slug.description: Identity for sentrykit.MonitorCron when cronmap.WithSentry() is set at Build. Default = slugify(name). Override when migrating from a service.WithCron name whose slug shouldn't change.
